title: short swords recolored
description: this texture pack changes the texture of the swords and shortens them and recolors them
body:
this texture pack changes the texture of the swords and shortens them and recolors them. like this. ![swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451a2a7b20d18ccf4a65637341369436617a9e89.png)![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/542ad8bb3bd2a7078e61557fe737891ff08ccb91.png)
this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.5 to 1.15
